name: S3 Ransomware via Individual Object Deletion
description: Simulates a ransomware attack that deletes S3 objects one at a time using s3:DeleteObject — generating a high-volume stream of individual CloudTrail events, each representing a single deleted object.
detection_signal: High volume of individual s3:DeleteObject events (not DeleteObjects) in rapid succession from a single principal — each appears as a separate CloudTrail event
